title: P18 CLV Closing-Line Availability Gate

governance_audit.stale_reason: P17-C generated in worktree context where tsl_odds_history.jsonl was absent

unblock_sequence: 2. Regenerate P17-C artifact against canonical root (will show 233 pairs)

annotation: paper_only=true。P18 CLV Gate。無網路呼叫。Formal gate = BLOCKED（兩原因：artifact chain stale + CEO 決策 DEFER）。Raw data audit 顯示 233 valid pairs（>200 threshold），但 governance 以 P17 artifact chain 為準。需 CEO 決策 + P17-C 重新產生才能解鎖。
